calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Req. For Extension Of Time To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances. This matter is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Tiffany F. Ng; Buchalter, APC; 415-227-0900; appearing as counsel for defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.

Ms. Ng contests the court's tentative ruling and argues that leave to amend should not be granted as plaintiff did not file an opposition or request leave to amend. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S PETITION is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of any cognizable claim. Plaintiff shall have 30 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S PETITION is OFF CALENDAR. The proof of service on file signed by Alyssa Kern under the penalty of perjury asserts that the Demurrer, dated by counsel on May 23, 2023, was mailed to the Plaintiff on May 9, 2023. Other parties were served on May 23, 2023 and the motion had not been filed until June 5, 2023 for a hearing on June 21, 2023.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER KEK LIM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to provide an argument, or any evidence, as to why he is likely to prevail on the merits at trial. (White v. Davis (2003) 30 Cal.4th 528, 554, 560.). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
